name: ADR validator confirms a profile_active reference is present linking to the active profile name
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1
status: accepted
deciders: [alice]
profile_active: regulated
' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check profile 2>out.txt && grep -q 'profile_active=regulated' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
